title: Compact View 📦
excerpt: Compact View is now enforced on Chrome. Dark mode, Rotectors API, live Roblox status, and a ton of fixes.
body:
With the recent reupload of Friends Remover, we gained over 100 users in just one week. We also saw an increase in how long people use the popup with Compact View — it's less laggy since it requires fewer API calls and only displays one friend at a time.

Because of this, we've officially removed the old friends list-style popup on Chrome. Compact View has become one of our best updates, so we're now fully enforcing it.

added.moreInfo: Compact View now has a full dark theme that syncs with your extension settings. Toggle it from the popup header — no page reload needed.

added.text: Rotectors API — auto-removal in background settings and flagger in popup
added.moreInfo: Friends Remover now connects to the Rotectors database. You can enable auto-removal of flagged users in Background Settings, and the popup will show a warning badge next to any friend flagged as a known exploiter.
Each friend card in Compact View now shows their current Roblox status — online, in-game, or offline — pulled in real time so you always know who's active.
A short cooldown is now applied between friend card scrolls to prevent hammering the Roblox API when flicking through your list quickly.
Rapidly pinning and unpinning the same friend no longer triggers multiple API writes. A brief cooldown debounces the action so only the final state gets saved.
The removal history panel now has a search box at the top. Type any username to filter your history instantly — useful if you have a long list and need to check a specific person.

added.text: API freezes after inactivity in settings or popup
added.moreInfo: If the popup or settings page is left open but idle for a while, background API polling now pauses automatically. This saves quota and prevents stale data from piling up.

removed.text: Friends list-style popup — Compact View is now enforced on Chrome
removed.moreInfo: The original list-style popup showed all your friends at once, which required a large number of API calls on load and caused noticeable lag on bigger lists. Compact View displays one friend at a time and is now the only popup mode on Chrome.

fixed.moreInfo: Tapping the select button on multiple friends in a row would sometimes deselect previous picks or freeze the UI. The selection state is now tracked correctly across all cards.

fixed.text: Friend removal completion after closing and reopening the popup
fixed.moreInfo: If you closed the popup mid-removal and reopened it, the removal queue would silently stop. The extension now resumes or correctly reports completion when the popup is reopened.
The Roblox homepage would sometimes flicker or render incorrectly when Compact View was open on top of it. The overlay layering has been fixed so the page underneath stays stable.

improved.moreInfo: The settings page now shows a proper skeleton loader while your preferences are being fetched, instead of a blank flash or partially rendered layout.
Profile pictures are now cached after the first load so they don't get re-fetched every time you scroll to a friend you've already seen in the same session.
Several redundant calls to the Roblox API have been merged or removed. On average, opening the popup now uses roughly half the API requests compared to v1.1.

improved.text: Moved background removers into their own dropdown and settings card
improved.moreInfo: Background removal options (like Rotectors auto-remove) were previously scattered across the settings page. They now live in a dedicated collapsible card for a cleaner layout.
Confirmation dialogs, error messages, and info modals across the popup have been restyled to match the current design language and work correctly in both light and dark mode.
